allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, re, html xml = sys.stdin.read\(\) paragraphs = re.findall\(r'<w:p[^>]*>\(.*?\)</w:p>', xml, re.DOTALL\) out = [] for p in paragraphs: style_match = re.search\(r'<w:pStyle w:val=\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"', p\) style = style_match.group\(1\) if style_match else '' texts = re.findall\(r'<w:t[^>]*>\(.*?\)</w:t>', p, re.DOTALL\) line = ''.join\(html.unescape\(t\) for t in texts\) if style.startswith\('Heading'\): level = ''.join\(c for c in style if c.isdigit\(\)\) or '1' out.append\('#' * int\(level\) + ' ' + line\) elif style == 'Title': out.append\('# ' + line\) else: out.append\(line\) print\('\\n'.join\(out\)\) ")
